description: Fixed prompt corpus for the agent-intelligence eval. Each entry maps to a plan success criterion: fewer clarifying turns, no wrong-grain ranking suggestions, no re-asking locked slots. The live runner (run-agent-intelligence-eval.ts) drives these against /agent/turn and tallies metrics flags-off vs flags-on; deterministic sub-checks are covered by unit tests (grain gate, smart-defaults, resolved-context).

expect.aggressivePosture: answers with Revenue + last-30d stated as assumptions, attaches a change chip, no blocking question

prompts.prompt: Rank the top 20 players by ARPU

expect.behavior: must NOT rank individuals by ARPU; recover with per-player metrics (revenue/LTV) via offer_choices

prompts.prompt: Top 10 countries by ARPU last 30 days

expect.behavior: ARPU is valid for a group ranking — proceed (do not strip it)

expect.aggressivePosture: answers with last-30d daily by default, states the window, offers a change chip
answers with last-30d by default, states the window

prompts.prompt: Rank the top 20 VIP players by First Purchase Rate over the last 7 days

expect.behavior: First Purchase Rate is a rate; for individuals recover with per-player metrics, carrying count + window forward in each pinText

prompts.priorContext: previous turn resolved metric=revenue, window=last 30 days

expect.behavior: reuse the resolved metric + window; do NOT re-ask them

prompts.prompt: actually show me currency outflow reasons by region instead

expect.behavior: substantial new question → rephrase gate clears the prior metric; do NOT silently reuse revenue
